content.en:
"You found Kukai Gravel?"

The Frostless Lord was surprised.

"Yes!" Ye Tian took out the Shattered Star Lord's Eternal Treasure and handed it to the Frostless Lord, "That piece of Frostless Sea Gravel is in this Eternal Treasure, but I am not a Legendary Realm Lord, and I can't peel off the Frostless Realm, and Lord Frostless, you are a Legendary Realm Lord, and you happen to control the space, so you are sure to take out the Frostless Gravel, so I came to ask the Frostless Lord for help this time." "

"It's not hard to take out the empty sea gravel. "

The Frostless Lord began to reach into this eternal treasure, and quickly locked on to the location of Kukai Gravel.

Airplanes!!!

The Eternal Arcana shook, but soon, a grain of empty sea gravel was stripped away by the Frostless Lord's ability to control space.

Wow!

The Kukai Gravel flew out from the tip of the Eternal Supreme Treasure and landed in the hands of the Frostless Lord, and was immediately handed over to Ye Tian.

"Thank you, Lord Frostless. "

Ye Tian thanked.

Now, he already has the Kuhai Gravel and Time River Bead, and in the end, only the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space are left, and he can gather three treasures to condense the Supreme Legend Body.

Fortunately, the space-time ancient leaf already has news, and it is in the hands of the white-bearded old man, but whether he can obtain the space-time ancient leaf, he is really not sure.

But, even then, he had to give it a try.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Frostless Lord's place.

......

"The white-bearded old man. "

Ye Tian learned specifically about the situation of the white-bearded old man from the Frostless Lord, but the Frostless Lord didn't know much, they all learned from the Legendary Realm Lord, and summarized it comprehensively.

But this didn't help him much, if he wanted to obtain the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, he had to go to the old man with white beard.

However, it is estimated that there are many Legendary Realm Lords who have visited or found the White Whiskers, but they have never heard of anyone obtaining the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space from the White Whisker Old Man.

"You have to try. "

Ye Tian muttered.

this day.

Ye Tian was going to visit the old man with white beard, and according to the news, the old man with white beard was in Xuyang Mountain in the Yongyang River.

Ye Tian soon came to the Yongyang River.

The Yongyang River also belongs to the Eternal Sea, and it is a very ancient Eternal Sea, and the white-bearded old man is the only peak Legendary Realm Lord of the Yongyang River.

In the Void Zone, the number of Peak Legendary Realm Lords is still extremely rare, because in the case of controlling time, and then controlling the space, or in the situation of controlling the space, and then controlling the time, the difficulty suddenly increases by a hundred times and a thousand times.

Because of this, peak Legendary Realm Lords who control both space and time are so rare.

In the case of a sharp chirp, it is quite good for an Eternal Sea to give birth to a Peak Legendary Realm Lord, and occasionally there will be two Peak Legendary Realm Lords in a powerful Eternal Sea at the same time, but most of the Eternal Seas do not even have a Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

It's like the Source Sea, not to mention the Legendary Realm Lord, there aren't many Legendary Lords, this belongs to the New Eternal Sea

Sunrise 1 A.

This is the first sacred mountain in Yongyang Sea, and it is also the territory of the white-bearded old man.

The white-bearded old man is also low-key, and rarely appears except for the occasional interaction with some old friends.

As a legendary lord, it is very difficult for Ye Tian to meet the white-bearded old man, not everyone can meet the white-bearded old man.

At the foot of Xuyang Mountain, when Ye Tian came here, he was stopped by a Legendary Realm Lord.

That's right, it's a Legendary Realm Lord, who used to be a servant of the white-bearded old man, and later became a Legendary Realm Lord.

"Stop. "

A burly man appeared out of thin air, staring at Ye Tian, bringing tremendous pressure to Ye Tian.

"I've seen the Lord of the Mountain!"

Ye Tian said politely.

"Rising Sun Mountain is not allowed to enter casually. "

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain said.

Ye Tian said, "Lord of the Shaking Mountain, I want to visit the white-bearded old man. "

Airplanes!

The Legendary Realm of the Lord of the Shaking Mountain was violently suppressed, and time and space were reversed, making Ye Tian feel the anger of a Legendary Realm Lord.

"You, a half-step Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord, are also visiting my master to me? Even ordinary Legendary Realm lords are not qualified to visit my master. "The Lord of the Shaking Mountain is very unkind.

"Please give the Lord of the Shaking Mountain a chance. "

Ye Tiandao.

"Opportunity?" "If anyone gives a chance, wouldn't my master be annoyed, if you want a chance, if you take my blow and don't die, I'll give you a chance." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

"Hahahaha, then your doppelganger is about to fall. "

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain said, pointing at him.

He's really shot!

Rumble!!!

A full-strength blow comparable to a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, although it was only equivalent to the full force of an ordinary half-step Legendary Realm Lord, there were only a handful of people among the Transcendence Realm Legendary Lords who could resist it.

And Ye Tian was only a half-step transcendent realm legendary lord, not even a transcendent realm legendary lord, and the mountain shaking lord thought that Ye Tian would definitely be shattered and killed with a single blow.

Ye Tian didn't exert the power to control time, because he could bear it.

The power of the Legendary-level Eternal Dao of a gate emerged, and the top-level Legendary Eternal Technique of a gate was instantly unleashed.

........ ，

In addition to the sixth-order Eternal Will, the Heaven and Earth are extremely powerful, and many forces are used for defense.

I saw that the one finger of the Lord of the Shaking Mountain shattered many of Ye Tian's defenses, but in the end, he was blocked by the resistance, and only brought Ye Tian a not too serious injury.

"Lord of the Shaking Mountain, am I resisting?"

Ye Tian asked.

"You, very good. "The Lord of the Shaking Mountain was very surprised, a half-step Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord could actually withstand the full force of the half-step Legendary Realm level, although he could only withstand the blow, it was also a very remarkable combat power.

Moreover, at the half-step Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord level, he has comprehended a lot of Legendary-level Eternal Dao, and has also created so many top-notch Legendary Eternal Skills, which are all extremely exaggerated.

"Okay, you have passed my postgraduate examination, I can give you a chance, but it is only a chance, whether you can meet my master depends on whether you can pass the test set by the master. "

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain began to talk about the test of the white-bearded old man.

"My master also prefers to be quiet, so he set up a test, but this test is for some half-step Legendary Realm Lords and some demonic Transcendence Realm Legendary Lords, as for the half-step Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord, they are the first to participate in the test. You, come with me, and I'll take you to the test. "

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain said.

"Thank you, Lord of the Shaking Mountain. "

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Immediately, he followed the Lord of the Shaking Mountain to the Nine Places of Trials set by the White-bearded Old Man. _
